title: Counterparty Reference
description: Identifies the other party in a dataspace usage event — the provider (for consumer-side metering) or the consumer (for provider-side metering).

counterpartyId.description: BPN, DID, or internal identifier of the counterparty

counterpartyRole.description: Role of the counterparty in this event

connectorId.description: EDC/DSP connector ID of the counterparty
